creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #38)

I tried your latest 1.110.2 patch, but it seems to have lost "version information":

% vmagent -version                                         
vmagent--bc69d5f
% xh firewall.andxor.it:8429/metrics | fgrep vm_app_version
vm_app_version{version="vmagent--bc69d5f", short_version=""} 1

You should apply this patch:

-GO_BUILDFLAGS= -ldflags="-w -X github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics/lib/buildinfo.Version=$${out}-${_GET_DATE:sh}-${BUILDINFO_TAG}"
+GO_BUILDFLAGS= -ldflags="-w -X github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics/lib/buildinfo.Version=$${out}-${_GET_DATE:sh}-tags-v${PORTVERSION}-0-g${BUILDINFO_TAG}"

Which produces:

% vmagent -version
vmagent--tags-v1.110.2-0-gbc69d5f
firewall 123857 ~
% xh firewall.andxor.it:8429/metrics | fgrep vm_app_version
vm_app_version{version="vmagent--tags-v1.110.2-0-gbc69d5f", short_version="v1.110.2"} 1

There seems to be still something broken with _GET_DATE though.
